titles.title: My Hope Is in the Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I stand in awe within The presence of the Lord In whom the wisdom Of the ages lies For whom the raging Of the sea subsides The Living Sacrifice The only source of life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My hope is in the Lord From this time on And ever-more My hope is in the Lord Forever-more

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His tender mercies come With every rising sun To meet the sinner in His brokenness To offer healing And forgiveness And those who trust in Him Will find their hearts at rest
